'''Saber 4''' was an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptor]]<ref name="CCG" /> which was manufactured by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]].<ref name="DB" /> The [[Interceptor/Legends|interceptor]] was part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[181st Imperial Fighter Wing/Legends|181st Imperial Fighter Wing's]] [[Saber Squadron (Imperial)/Legends|Saber Squadron]]<ref name="CCG" /> by [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="date note">The ''[[Death Star II Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]] is set around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> and [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by [[DS-181-4]],<ref name="CCG" /> who served as the [[Wingmate/Legends|wingman]] of [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Turr Phennir]],<ref name="CCG1">{{CCG|set=Death Star II Limited|cardname=DS-181-4}}</ref> also from Saber Squadron.<ref name="CCG2">{{CCG|set=Death Star II Limited|cardname=Saber 2}}</ref> Saber 4 was often assigned to fly in a reserve position in battle, and bore a [[Bloodstripe (symbol)|bloodstripe]] representing at least 10 [[Death/Legends|kills]] made by DS-181-4.<ref name="CCG" />

In 4 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> DS-181-4 fought in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]],<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|212|DS-181-4}}</ref> where [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] attempted to destroy the Empire's [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]] with [[TIE pilot]]s defending the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] from the Alliance starfighters. The battle ended in an Imperial defeat and the Death Star's destruction.<ref name="ROTJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Saber 4 was created for a card for [[2000]]'s ''[[Death Star II Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Decipher]] [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="CCG" />
